name: 🐰ցմճճվ || ղҽա բɾíҽղժ??
description: Gubby takes the appearance of a small, fat white low-poly rabbit which has the "Roundy" head along with the "Mysterious" face and a chunky oval body along with 4 long oval sticks for legs. It has triangular bunny ears on the top of the head, a white bunny tail at the end of it's torso
